About Us

Our Vision

New World Trade is instrumental in creating a world where transactions are liberated, and where transactional integrity, greater transparency, trust in all interactions, and new mediums of exchange have emerged. We envision a world where people have become knowledgeable and are inspired by the possibility of digital assets empowering their lives.

Get Started
Features

Why New World Trade?

International Reach

Our services are available across the globe in different continents, such as America, Europe, Asia, etc.

Data Security

All information is secured against DDoS attacks with full data encryption.

Seamless Payments

Our payment option is cryptocurrency for swift transactions.

Automated Services

All operations are AI driven providing our customers with quaity services.

High End Returns

The ROI rates are as competitive as any found in the market.

Help & Faq

Frequently Asked Questions

To begin a new investment with New World Trade, you first have to signup here, then fill in your details on the signup form. After creating an account, you then have to select an investment plan of your choice and fund it. That's all. You can now start earning your profits.

Yes, we do not charge for signups. Your investment sum is all the expenditure required (this serves as capital). Many Investment Options to choose from.

Yes, of course. Once an urgent needs arises, your investment sum will be refunded to you and your contract stopped. This can be processed within 48hrs if you are not compounding.

This is not allowed here. Referal bonuses are incentives for investing with us.

Yes, New World Trade is duly registered and fully authorised to run investment management.
